global_buttons.Create Complete Production: Runs AUTO PIPELINE: research -> script -> storyboard -> assets -> voice -> video -> music/SFX -> captions -> edit -> render -> SEO package.
global_buttons.Regenerate: Reruns the current asset using same prompt/model with seed/version tracking.
global_buttons.Compare Models: Runs same prompt against selected AI providers and ranks output by score, cost, speed.
global_buttons.Save to Project: Stores file, prompt, provider, model, cost, seed, metadata and preview in project.

security_buttons.Test Connection: Validates MuAPI key and enabled model endpoints.
security_buttons.Rotate Key: Creates new encrypted token and invalidates old key.
security_buttons.Audit Logs: Shows all API calls, costs, users, prompts and downloads.
security_buttons.Consent Vault: Stores consent proof for voices, faces and avatars.
